title: おにぎり、あたためますか！！！？

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Rice ball, paper, scissors...

text_block_list.name: Golshi & Nakayama
text_block_list.text:
Cylinder!
Circle!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Yes! I activate the power of the warrior! "Forward
March"!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Not so fast! Witness the true strength of the
commoners! "Revolt"!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: A counter?! Fine—then I play, "Sword Hunt"!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I should've known! Then what do you think about
this? "Bamboo Spears"!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Damn it! Sword Hunt doesn't work on Bamboo
Spears!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
There's nothing left now. Time for my last resort...
"Cataclysm"!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Are you out of your mind?! The field will be
ravaged by the famine effect with that move!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: ...What is this game even about?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I'm just as lost as you... It's very schwierig, or I
should say, difficult to comprehend.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Hey, you guys. We're playing a game of rice ball,
paper, scissors!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Cylinder-shaped rice balls represent the
peasants, the round ones are the soldiers, and the
triangle rice balls are the rice balls.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Soldiers and rice balls beat peasants, but rice
balls beat soldiers too.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: But when peasants are up against soldiers, soldiers can make the call "Forward March."

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
The soldiers will start preparing for war—but
there's a way to nip that in the bud.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
You call "Revolt" with the peasants. But then,
that can be stopped by making the soldiers do
"Sword Hunt."

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Which is countered by "Bamboo Spears." Then,
the round ends in a stalemate.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Except you can counter the stalemate if either
player calls "Cataclysm."

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Heh... With that, the field effect changes to
either "Bounty" or "Famine"!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, so basically we're in a real crazy situation!
Get it now?!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Did you understand any of that?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Hmm... Well, if there's one thing I understood...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
It would be that playing the triangle rice ball
gives you an instant win, yes?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
But knowing them, a quick route to victory
wouldn't be very exciting.
